  "verses": [

      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee irr arridsan nahku-
fchi/ un winnu remantojfchi/ bet
	awai Balkfnet tee ne ter klaufsij-
fchi/ un tawa Baufsibā tee ne
irr ftafgajfchi/ wiſſu/ ko tu win-
neem efti pawehleig darriht/ tee
ne irr darrijschi/ tad efti tu teem
wiſſu fcho Launu lizzis uſeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Redſi/ tohē Kaexa Rih-
kus/ tee irr pee Pilsfahta nah-
kufchi to uſjent/ un tas Pils-
fahts irr teem Kaldeēreem Roh-
kā dohts/ kas prett winxu kar-
to zaur Sohbinu un Baddu/
un Mehri/ un ko tu efti runnajs/
tā irr tas notizzis/ un raugi/ Tu
pats to redſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir tomehr efti tu uhs
manni fazzijs/ ak Kungs
KUNGS! Pirzees to Tihrumu
par Naudu/ un laid tee Leezinee-
ki to apleezina/ fur tomehr tas
Pilefahts teem Kaldeēreem irr
Rohkā dohts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad notifke ta KUNGA
Wahrds uhs Jeremiju/ un faz-
zijat
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rangi/ Es eſmu tas
KUNGS/ tas Deews wiſſas
Meetas: Irrag jebkurxa Leeta
preekſch mannis ne-eefpehjama:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ta fakka tas
KUNGS: Rangi/ es nodoh-
mu fcho Pilsfahtu teem Kalde-
eeem Rohkā/ un NebukadRe-
zaram tam Fehntxain no Babe-
les Rohkā/ un winſch to uſjeins.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Kaldeēri/ kas prett
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tee Ifraēta Behrni
un tee Behrni Juha irr tik-
darrijschi/ kas tauns irr manni
Azzis no fawas Jaunibas/ fa-
scham tee Ifraēta Behrni
manni tikkai apfaitinafschi za-
fawo Rohku Darbeem/ falla t
KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo fchis Pilsfahts
manni us Dufnibu/ un
Bahrsibu eekaitinafs/ no ta-
Deenas/ ka tee to irr tafsifs-
tihds fchodeen/ ka es winau
mannu Waiga atjemtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiffia Launuma dehf
Ifraēta Behrnu/ un to Behr-
Juha/ ko tee irr darrijschi ma-
nis apfaitinaht/ Winnee/ wi-
no Kehnizi/ winno Lee-Kung-
winno Preesteri/ un winno Pi-
weefchi/ un tee Wihti no Ju-
da/ un tee Eedsihwotaji no Je-
rusalemēs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas us manni to Pak-
fu irr atgreesufchi/ un ue
Waigu. Jepſchu es tohs
mahziju allaschin/ un tomehr
ne klauffja Pamahzitchannu p-
nemt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee irr fawas Neg-
tibas likenschi eekſch ta Na-
ma/ kas pehz manna Wahr-
"
